description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun-style rifle resembling the iconic Heckler & Koch MP5, featuring a robust polymer lower receiver and a metal upper receiver. The rifle is equipped with a folding stock, a detachable curved magazine, and a short barrel with a simple muzzle device. The top of the receiver has a Picatinny rail for mounting optics, while the standard iron sights are present for aiming. The fire selector switch and trigger assembly are clearly visible, along with a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A small group of loose cartridges and a detached magazine are positioned nearby, emphasizing its reloadable nature.
description: A compact black rifle with a folding stock, curved detachable magazine, and iron sights, resembling an MP5. Features a Picatinny rail and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Angled side view displaying the folding stock, curved magazine, pistol grip, and loose cartridges.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fire selector, magazine well, and overall compact design.
